policy_delta_summary: No policy delta exists; fixture records required fields for a future router-policy update.
feedback_source: planned benchmark, verifier, and governance feedback; no training run has occurred
reward_or_preference_signal: planned reward = task success + verified evidence use - cost - unsupported claims - authority violations
reward_boundary: reward is a proposed proxy only and cannot stand in for route quality, authority fit, or task success
update_constraint: policy update must preserve authority, evidence, and rollback boundaries
drift_bound: not measured; would require KL, capability-field, or route-change bound before promotion
governance_gate_refs: planned: human review for high-impact update
rollback_plan: rollback to previous router policy if evaluation, governance, or regression gates fail
monitor_window: not opened; would be required before canary or promotion
deployment_scope: none; fixture is not deployed or trained
residuals: no policy optimization experiment has been run
external RL literature has source notes but no local reproduction or evidence transition
non_claims: This fixture is not a PPO, DPO, GRPO, or RLVR result.
This fixture does not prove reward quality.
This fixture does not prove that a router policy improved.
